name: Jackson County
description_short: Jackson County Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution in Edna, Texas offering savings accounts, certificates, and secured/unsecured loans to local members.
description_long:
Jackson County Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union headquartered in Edna, Texas. As a not-for-profit financial cooperative, it operates under NCUA insurance and serves the Jackson County community with personalized banking solutions. The institution has been providing financial services with a focus on local, confidential customer service.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of deposit and lending products. On the savings side, members can access Share Draft checking accounts with monthly dividends and statements, Regular Share savings accounts with quarterly dividends, Special Share savings accounts, and Regular Certificates with flexible dividend options. For borrowing, Jackson County FCU provides auto loans for new and used vehicles, boat and RV financing, unsecured personal loans, and share-secured loans. The institution emphasizes competitive rates and low fees compared to traditional banks.

What distinguishes Jackson County FCU is its local, community-focused approach and emphasis on member relationships. The credit union operates from a single location in Edna and maintains limited but convenient hours with both lobby and drive-through access. Their direct contact approach—encouraging members to call with questions and discuss options—reflects a personalized service model typical of smaller regional credit unions serving specific geographic communities.

As a single-branch institution in a small Texas town, Jackson County FCU is best suited for local residents and eligible members seeking straightforward financial products and personal service. The limited hours and single location may present accessibility challenges for those outside Edna or with scheduling constraints. Members should expect traditional banking services rather than digital-first features.
services: Share Draft checking accounts with monthly dividends and statements
Regular Share savings accounts with quarterly dividends
Special Share savings accounts with quarterly dividends
Regular Certificates (CDs) with dividend payout or compounding options
New auto, boat, and RV loans
Used auto, boat, and RV loans
Fraud reporting and suspected debit card fraud support
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 per account category
Multiple loan options including auto, boat, RV, unsecured personal loans, and share-secured loans
Competitive rates emphasized on their rates page and membership materials
Low fees compared to traditional banks, as stated in membership promotion
Quarterly and monthly dividend payments on savings accounts
Share certificates (CDs) with flexible dividend payout or compounding options
Direct, personalized customer service with accessible phone and email contact
cons: Single physical location in Edna, Texas limits accessibility for non-local members
Limited lobby hours (9am-4pm Mon-Fri) and drive-through hours may not accommodate all schedules
No visible mention of online or mobile banking capabilities on website
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly stated on available pages
Limited digital features or self-service options compared to larger financial institutions
best_for: Jackson County residents seeking local, personalized banking with relationship-based service
Community members looking for competitive loan rates on autos, boats, or RVs
Savers wanting NCUA-insured accounts with dividend-paying share and certificate products
Individuals preferring member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions over banks
diagnosis: Jackson County FCU is best for residents of Edna, Texas and surrounding Jackson County areas seeking straightforward savings accounts, certificates, and installment loans with a community-focused, relationship-based banking experience. The main caveat is that this single-branch credit union has limited hours and geographic accessibility, making it impractical for members outside the local area or those requiring flexible digital banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Jackson County — Credit Union in Edna, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Jackson County — NCUA-insured credit union in Edna, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
